sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: J M Smucker declares $1.10 dividend
feed.summary: The J. M. Smucker Company has declared a quarterly dividend of $1.10 per share on its common stock. This dividend is payable on June 3, 2026, to shareholders of record as of May 16, 2026.

feed.title: Dollar General Earnings Preview: What to Expect
feed.summary: Dollar General (DG) is set to release its fiscal Q1 2027 results, with analysts expecting an EPS of $1.90, marking a 6.7% increase year-over-year. The company has consistently beaten Wall Street's earnings estimates in the past four quarters. Despite a recent stock drop following a CEO transition announcement, analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with a target price suggesting a 20% upside.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley says these top stocks have more room to run ahead of earnings
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley identifies several top stocks, including Spotify, S&P Global, Warner Music Group, and Datadog, that are poised for further gains before their upcoming earnings reports. Analysts cite diversifying portfolios, innovation, strong engagement, and undervaluation as key reasons for their positive outlook despite some slight price target adjustments. The firm believes these companies offer attractive upside for investors.

feed.title: Sava Infond d.o.o. Trims Stock Holdings in Lam Research Corporation $LRCX
feed.summary: Sava Infond d.o.o. reduced its stake in Lam Research Corporation by 8.7% in the fourth quarter, selling 6,900 shares and holding 72,750 shares worth $12.45 million, representing 1.7% of its portfolio. Lam Research (NASDAQ: LRCX) beat Q3 expectations and provided strong AI-driven guidance, leading to analyst upgrades and an average "Moderate Buy" rating. Despite high institutional ownership and increasing stakes from major firms like Vanguard and State Street, some analysts caution about valuation concerns, as the stock may already price in much of the AI upside.

feed.title: The Hartford Financial Services Group, Inc. (NYSE:HIG) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: The Hartford Financial Services Group (NYSE:HIG) reported strong Q1 2026 results, with core earnings of $866 million and a core earnings ROE of 20.3%. The company highlighted strong premium growth in Business Insurance, improved underlying combined ratio in Personal Insurance, and robust performance in Employee Benefits, driven by life and disability. Executives discussed strategies for maintaining profitability amidst a competitive market, including disciplined underwriting, leveraging technology and AI, and expanding into new segments, while addressing questions on pricing, competition, and capital management.

feed.title: Rexford Industrial Realty, Inc. (NYSE:REXR) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Rexford Industrial Realty, Inc. (NYSE: REXR) delivered a strong first quarter in 2026, setting a record for leasing activity at 4.1 million square feet and outperforming expectations. The company is advancing strategic priorities including dispositions, accretive capital recycling through share repurchases, and operational rigor; leading to an increased full-year outlook. Despite some market softness, particularly in larger Class A spaces, Rexford is encouraged by early signs of improvement, focusing on occupancy and an irreplaceable portfolio in supply-constrained Southern California.

feed.title: What to Expect From Campbell’s Next Quarterly Earnings Report
feed.summary: Campbell Soup Co. (CPB) is set to release its fiscal Q3 2026 earnings, with analysts projecting a 35.6% decline in adjusted EPS to $0.47. The stock has underperformed the broader market, falling 43.9% over the past year, attributed to muted growth, margin pressures, and consumers shifting away from packaged goods. The consensus analyst rating is a "Hold," with a modest 9.3% upside potential from its current price.

feed.title: Did Vistra’s (VST) Meta Nuclear Deal and Pelosi Options Move Just Shift Its Investment Narrative?
feed.summary: Vistra Corp. recently finalized a 20-year power purchase agreement to supply nuclear-generated electricity to Meta Platforms, strengthening its position in long-term clean power provision. This deal, coupled with Nancy Pelosi exercising call options on Vistra stock, has drawn increased attention to the company's investment narrative. The article examines how this long-term nuclear supply deal could influence Vistra's evolving risk profile and future cash flows, highlighting the balance between contracted sales, debt management, and growth initiatives, while still advising investors to be aware of regulatory and refinancing risks.

feed.title: HCA Healthcare, Inc. (NYSE:HCA) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: HCA Healthcare reported its Q1 2026 earnings, beating EPS expectations with $7.15 against an anticipated $7.12. The company faced challenges from a mild respiratory season and winter storms, impacting volumes, but these were largely offset by greater-than-anticipated benefits from state supplemental programs. HCA reaffirmed its full-year 2026 guidance, expecting volumes and other financial metrics to align with original plans for the remainder of the year, driven by improving trends and ongoing resiliency efforts.

feed.title: PENN Entertainment (PENN) Near Breakeven Q1 Loss Tests Bullish Profitability Narratives
feed.summary: PENN Entertainment reported a near breakeven Q1 2026 loss of US$0.02 EPS on revenues of US$1.8 billion, a marked improvement from larger losses in previous quarters. While trailing twelve-month losses remain substantial at US$957.2 million, this quarter's results prompt questions about whether it signals the start of expected profit margin improvements. The company's low P/S ratio and significant DCF fair value point to a potential undervaluation, despite slower revenue growth compared to the market.

feed.title: Globe Life (GL) Gets a Buy from Truist Financial
feed.summary: Truist Financial analyst Mark Hughes maintained a Buy rating on Globe Life (GL) with a price target of $185.00, noting his strong performance in the Financial sector. This positive rating follows a similar Buy rating from TD Cowen, despite a recent Hold rating from BMO Capital. The article also highlights Globe Life's recent financial performance, reporting $1.52 billion in quarterly revenue and a net profit of $266 million, though it notes negative insider sentiment with increased selling of GL shares.

feed.title: Analysts Offer Insights on Technology Companies: Intel (INTC), Roper Technologies (ROP) and Fastly (FSLY)
feed.summary: Analysts have issued neutral ratings for Intel (INTC), Roper Technologies (ROP), and Fastly (FSLY), indicating a balanced view on these technology stocks. William Stein from Truist Financial maintained a Hold rating for Intel with an $81.00 price target, while Kenneth Wong from Oppenheimer reiterated a Hold rating for Roper Technologies. Param Singh, also from Oppenheimer, maintained a Hold rating for Fastly.

feed.title: PDF Solutions Ups Revolving Credit Facility to $75 Million, Adds Leverage-Based Fees With Wells Fargo
feed.summary: PDF Solutions has amended its credit agreement, increasing its revolving credit facility to $75 million and implementing leverage-based commitment fees. This change, effective April 23, 2026, is intended to boost liquidity and better align pricing with the company's leverage. The annual fee will vary from 0.20% to 0.50% based on the total debt to EBITDA ratio.

feed.title: Verizon Communications Inc. $VZ Shares Sold by Solidarity Wealth LLC
feed.summary: Solidarity Wealth LLC significantly reduced its stake in Verizon Communications Inc. (VZ) by selling 89.7% of its shares, aligning with recent net sales by corporate insiders, including Director Hans Erik Vestberg. Despite these sales, Verizon exceeded quarterly earnings expectations, provided strong FY2026 guidance, and increased its quarterly dividend. The company also saw positive news regarding its Frontline Network Slice expansion, 5G network deployment for the FIFA World Cup, and a legal win against T-Mobile, though upcoming Q1 earnings present some caution for investors.

feed.title: Wells Fargo Keeps Their Buy Rating on Popular (BPOP)

Popular reported strong earnings for the quarter ending December 31, with revenue of $1.12 billion and net profit of $233.9 million, showing growth from the previous year. Despite positive analyst sentiment, corporate insider activity indicates a negative trend, with an increase in insider selling of BPOP shares over the past quarter.

feed.title: Virtus Wealth Solutions LLC Invests $2.91 Million in United Airlines Holdings Inc $UAL
feed.summary: Virtus Wealth Solutions LLC has invested $2.91 million in United Airlines Holdings Inc (NASDAQ:UAL), acquiring 26,005 shares in the fourth quarter, making it their 25th-largest holding. This comes as United Airlines reported stronger-than-expected Q1 earnings, though management warned about rising fuel costs and capacity cuts impacting future margins. The stock currently holds a consensus "Buy" rating from analysts, with various firms recently raising their price targets for UAL.

feed.title: Two 'Costcos' in China — but only one is official
feed.summary: A dispute has arisen in China over the use of the "Costco" name, as a Beijing-based entity promoted plans for a $1.5 billion "Costco" headquarters, despite the official Costco (China) Investment Co., Ltd. denying any affiliation and pursuing legal action. The case highlights the complexities of corporate registration and trademark ownership in China, particularly as the official Costco's expansion in the mainland remains cautious compared to the ambitious plans of the unofficial entity. The legal validity of trademark rights and authorizations is central to resolving who can legitimately use the Costco name in the country.

feed.title: ProVise Management Group LLC Sells 10,667 Shares of Citigroup Inc. $C

(NYSE:C) by 5.7% during the fourth quarter, selling 10,667 shares and leaving it with 177,668 shares valued at approximately $20.73 million.
